created_by.description: JSON-encoded array of user IDs. Only returns insights whose `created_by` is in the list, e.g. `[1,42]`.

created_date_from.description: Filter by `created_at > created_date_from`. Accepts absolute or relative dates.

created_date_to.description: Filter by `created_at < created_date_to`. Accepts absolute or relative dates.

dashboards.description: JSON-encoded array of dashboard IDs. Returns insights attached to every listed dashboard (AND).

date_from.description: Filter by `last_modified_at > date_from`. Accepts absolute dates (`2025-04-23`) or relative strings (`-7d`, `-1m`).

date_to.description: Filter by `last_modified_at < date_to`. Accepts absolute dates or relative strings.

favorited.description: Include this parameter (any value) to restrict results to insights marked as favorited.

insight.description: Restrict to a single insight type. `JSON` matches non-wrapper query insights; `SQL` matches HogQL queries.

last_viewed_date_from.description: Filter by `last_viewed_at > last_viewed_date_from`. Accepts absolute or relative dates.

last_viewed_date_to.description: Filter by `last_viewed_at < last_viewed_date_to`. Accepts absolute or relative dates.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

saved.description: When truthy, restricts results to insights that are saved (or attached to a visible dashboard). When falsy, only unsaved insights.

search.description: Case-insensitive substring match across name, derived_name, description, and tag names.

tags.description: JSON-encoded array of tag names. Returns insights with any of the listed tags.

user.description: Include this parameter (any value) to restrict results to insights created by the authenticated user.
